description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SHARPy Tests that runs on push to specific Python files, library files, and workflow files, and on pull requests to master, develop, and rc* branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Python 3.10.8, checking out the code, setting up Python, GCC, and conda, pre-installing dependencies, building and testing the project with coverage, and uploading coverage to Codecov.
